files.notes: Local wrapper filename references were updated after replacing dash-prefixed CMD entrypoints with underscore-prefixed entrypoints. The deleted standalone helper-script repository URL was replaced with the toolkit n8n workflow helper scripts package link in the extracted public prompt.

Wrapper path and console formatting adapted after migration to use the underscore-prefixed toolkit wrapper, co-located helper script resolution, framed colored retry output, console clearing before reruns, and trusted absolute SystemRoot Windows PowerShell resolution instead of PATH.

Wrapper path and console formatting adapted after migration to use the underscore-prefixed toolkit wrapper, co-located helper script resolution, framed colored retry output, console clearing before reruns, restart-option prompting aligned with the import helper, and trusted absolute SystemRoot Windows PowerShell resolution instead of PATH.
Toolkit-adapted after migration to stay aligned with the n8n workflow-toolkit helper and ignore stale node-ID credential bindings when both node name and node type differ.

Toolkit-adapted after migration to stay aligned with the n8n workflow-toolkit helper, make project-local workflow hook autoload opt-in via N8N_WORKFLOW_HOOK_AUTOLOAD while preserving explicit N8N_WORKFLOW_HOOK_SCRIPT configuration, use separator-aware strict child-path checks so clearable run directories must resolve under .tmp on Windows and non-Windows PowerShell hosts, reject symlink, junction, and reparse-point run-directory components before recursive export staging cleanup, refuse unresolved or filesystem-root repo-root fallback so .tmp and .n8n-local state is not created under helper folders or drive roots, and provide colored section/status output with clean failure reporting.

Toolkit-adapted after migration to stay aligned with the n8n workflow-toolkit helper, make project-local workflow hook autoload opt-in via N8N_WORKFLOW_HOOK_AUTOLOAD while preserving explicit N8N_WORKFLOW_HOOK_SCRIPT configuration, prevent dry-run hook execution, revalidate prepared workflow JSON after before-live-import hooks with explicit prepared-import validation before live import execution, clear prepared import staging per run, exit before before-live-import hooks when no payloads are planned, use separator-aware strict child-path checks so clearable run directories must resolve under .tmp on Windows and non-Windows PowerShell hosts, reject symlink, junction, and reparse-point run-directory components before recursive cleanup, refuse unresolved or filesystem-root repo-root fallback so .tmp and .n8n-local state is not created under helper folders or drive roots, and provide colored section/status output with clean failure reporting.

Repo-root resolution was added after migration and hardened to refuse filesystem roots so .n8n-local command history is maintained only under a safe repo root instead of under helper folders or drive roots. Toolkit-adapted to resolve import, export, and validation helper commands from the co-located template folder, canonicalize trusted replay paths, resolve Node explicitly, block old, malformed, or untrusted saved previous-command records, and provide colored section/status output.
Toolkit-adapted after migration to stay aligned with the n8n workflow-toolkit helper and skip stale node-ID credential bindings when both node name and node type differ.

Toolkit-adapted after migration to stay aligned with the n8n workflow-toolkit helper, keep machine-readable credential binding paths slash-normalized while displaying local console paths with native separators.

Toolkit-adapted after migration to stay aligned with the n8n workflow-toolkit helper, make project-local validation-rule autoload opt-in via N8N_WORKFLOW_VALIDATION_RULES_AUTOLOAD while preserving explicit N8N_WORKFLOW_VALIDATION_RULES configuration, and add explicit prepared-import validation mode for live import payload revalidation while keeping default directory-name and committed-template hygiene enforcement strict.
